name: Jane Doe ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ
description:
"𝐖𝐞𝐥𝐥, 𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐭 𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞 𝐰𝐚𝐬 𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐭 𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞! 𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞, 𝐈'𝐦 𝐭𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐭𝐡. 𝐓𝐫𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐦𝐞~"

~𝐈𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐑𝐎𝐆𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎

●●●◐○

YO .ᐟ

Sorry for ghostin’ y’all for a bit—work and all that jazz got my brain busy. Honestly, I’ve never been super consistent here, so, meh.

But hey, as y’all asked a while back, here’s a bot for Jane Doe! And, just because someone also threw it out there, I dropped a Nekomata bot too with a different vibe. You ask, I deliver. Simple as that XD

Not gonna drag this out too much since I’m racing the clock, but look at me still squeezin’ in some time to make a few bots!

Have fun, folks. If there are any issues, just hit me up in the comments, and I’ll try to sort it out. And to the brainless crowd out there—NO, the bot talking for you ain’t my problem, alright? Blame the LLM, not me. I’m totally innocent here!

Artists: Birdblitz and Moecode
creator: Olly44
